query:
-- Check American Valmark deal and its payouts
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.customerName,
  d.contractType,
  d.isChurned,
  d.churnMonth,
  d.churnYear,
  DATE_ADD(
    DATE(CONCAT_WS('-', d.churnYear, LPAD(d.churnMonth, 2, '0'), '01')), 
    INTERVAL 30 DAY
  ) as churnPlus30Days,
  COUNT(cp.id) as payoutCount,
  MIN(cp.payoutYear * 100 + cp.payoutMonth) as firstPayoutYearMonth,
  MAX(cp.payoutYear * 100 + cp.payoutMonth) as lastPayoutYearMonth
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN commission_payouts cp ON d.id = cp.dealId
WHERE d.customerName LIKE '%American Valmark%'
GROUP BY d.id, d.customerName, d.contractType, d.isChurned, d.churnMonth, d.churnYear

    INTERVAL 30 DAY
  ) as churnPlus30Days,
  COUNT(cp.id) as payoutCount,
  MIN(cp.payoutYear * 100 + cp.payoutMonth) as firstPayoutYearMonth,
  MAX(cp.payoutYear * 100 + cp.payoutMonth) as lastPayoutYearMonth
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN commission_payouts cp ON d.id = cp.dealId
WHERE d.customerName LIKE '%American Valmark%'
GROUP BY d.id, d.customerName, d.contractType, d.isChurned, d.churnMonth, d.churnYear
